title: Consult thrash/cost budget
description: Configuration, live counters, and abort record for the deterministic per-logical-unit consult thrash/cost budget meter (plan U5; requirements R21/R22/R2). The meter is independent of the spawn budget (max_children / depth_remaining): those fields are NOT part of this schema and must not influence the verdict.

config.description: The budget dials. All caps and weights are documented constants fixed in references/consult-budget.md; a caller may override individual values.

caps.description: Per-dimension caps. A counter reaching (>=) its cap trips that dimension on its own.

respawn_count.description: Max continuation respawns one logical unit may chain through.

cumulative_tokens.description: Cumulative model tokens spent across the whole logical-unit chain.

repeated_reread_count.description: Max times the same file is re-read across the chain (spinning signal).

no_progress_diff_count.description: Max consecutive continuations producing no measurable diff/progress.

near_duplicate_question_count.description: Max near-duplicate reworded re-asks of an already-asked question.

transcript_ancestry_depth.description: R22: max transcript-ancestry depth of the continuation chain (capped separately from depth_remaining).

total_transcript_bytes.description: R22: max total raw transcript bytes carried laterally across the chain.

weights.description: Per-dimension weight applied to each dimension's normalized fill (counter / cap) when summing the composite cost score against hard_ceiling.

hard_ceiling.description: Absolute ceiling on the weighted composite cost score. Fires regardless of any single dimension -- the unconditional backstop against grinding on every axis at once.

near_duplicate_similarity_threshold.description: Jaccard token-overlap at or above which two normalized questions are near-duplicate.

counters.description: Live per-logical-unit counters fed to evaluate(). near_duplicate_question_count may be supplied directly OR derived deterministically from the raw `questions` history.

questions.description: Ordered question history; when near_duplicate_question_count is absent it is derived from this list via the normalized-token fingerprint.

abort_record.description: Reconstructable record written to consults/aborts/ when the meter trips, so a logical unit's abort is auditable from files alone (R23). The abort rides the existing `blocked` path (R2).

logical_unit.description: Identifier of the aborted logical unit (the continuation chain).

tripped_dimension.description: The dimension that tripped, or 'hard_ceiling' when only the composite ceiling fired.

ceiling_hit.description: Whether the absolute composite ceiling fired (independent of any single dimension).

counter_values.description: The resolved per-dimension counter values at abort time (near-duplicate count is the derived value).

composite_score.description: The weighted composite cost score at abort time.

last_progress_ref.description: Pointer to the last progress/chain artifact before abort, for reconstruction.
